title: Xbox faces restructuring with studio closures and executive departures
summary: Microsoft Xbox is undergoing a massive restructuring that includes the closure of studios such as Compulsion Games, the departure of top executives, and increased pressure for profitability, with potential changes to its strategy.

title: EA launches advertising platform to integrate ads in games
summary: Electronic Arts presents EA Advertising, a new platform that allows brands to place ads directly within the gameplay of its titles.

title: Dead by Daylight celebrates its tenth anniversary with major changes
summary: Behaviour Interactive commemorates 10 years of Dead by Daylight with a visual overhaul, mod support, collaborations like Scooby-Doo, and a roadmap for the future.

title: June 2026 Steam Next Fest offers thousands of playable demos
summary: The Steam Next Fest event returns with over 4,000 free demos of upcoming releases, including notable titles from various genres.

title: Summer Game Fest 2026: Nintendo Direct is the most watched and Ocarina of Time remake the most popular trailer
summary: Summer Game Fest 2026 has left Nintendo Direct as the most followed showcase, with the Zelda: Ocarina of Time remake as the most watched trailer, and a large number of standout indie games.

title: Overwatch Season 3 introduces the new hero Shion
summary: Overwatch Season 3 includes the character Shion, an agile-style hero inspired by John Wick and Akira, along with a new battle pass and skins.

title: The entire Final Fantasy series is on sale on Steam
summary: Steam has discounts on all Final Fantasy games, including FF7 Remake, FF7 Rebirth, and other classic titles in the franchise.

title: Dragon's Dogma 2 removes microtransactions and deluxe edition
summary: Capcom removes microtransactions from Dragon's Dogma 2 and discontinues the deluxe edition, two years after the game's launch.

title: Blizzard sues World of Warcraft private server for massive infringement
summary: Blizzard files a lawsuit against a private WoW server, accusing it of generating millions of dollars through ongoing infringement of its intellectual property.

title: New clues suggest a faithful remake of Zelda: Ocarina of Time
summary: Hidden descriptions and data have been discovered pointing to a complete remake of The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time, although Nintendo quickly removed the information.

title: Marvel vs. Capcom 3 update causes problems by breaking a top character
summary: Ultimate Marvel vs. Capcom 3 receives an unexpected patch that, instead of fixing the game, breaks one of the strongest characters, generating criticism.

title: Halo: Campaign Evolved announces release date and rises in PlayStation pre-orders
summary: Halo: Campaign Evolved confirms its release date and begins to climb the PlayStation pre-order charts after the confirmation of Gears of War: E-Day exclusivity for Xbox.

title: Assassin's Creed Shadows receives its final update on June 16
summary: Assassin's Creed Shadows launches its definitive patch, which includes a new story mission and additional content for the end of the game.

title: HBO reveals actor for Harry Potter series and Quidditch details
summary: HBO's Harry Potter series has found its actor for an iconic character and has explained the unique approach to portraying Quidditch.

title: Dishonored developers defend the importance of loading screens
summary: The creators of Dishonored argue that loading screens are an important part of the gaming experience that could disappear in new generations.

title: Mark Gordon leaves his role as Treyarch studio head
summary: Treyarch studio head Mark Gordon leaves the company after nearly a decade leading the Call of Duty developer.

title: Meccha Chameleon is shaping up to be the next great party game
summary: Meccha Chameleon is praised as an excellent multiplayer party game, available as a demo, with a great reception and questions about the number of players.

title: UK includes video game services in social media ban for minors
summary: The new British law that bans social media for under-16s also applies to gaming services, although multiplayer sessions are not affected.

title: The DOKAPON 3-2-1 collection arrives on Steam on June 29
summary: Publisher Sting releases the DOKAPON 3-2-1: Super Collection! compilation on PC, bringing together several titles in the series.

title: Hacker group claims to have stolen Nintendo data and demands $2 million
summary: A group of hackers claims to have breached Nintendo's security and demands a ransom of $2 million, which has raised alarm in the industry.
